creator: max@wide.ad.jp
text:
asami> Are you sure you have the most recent port?  It should be
    asami> fixed in patches/patch-ac:

I thought I did, but the truth was I didn't.  Yeah, you are right.  

I think something was wrong with my cvsup and the cvs repository I had
was sort of messed up.

Anyway, It was completely my misunderstanding.  So, I'll go ahead 'n'
close the PR.

Masafumi
